title: Is Longer Than
description: Write a Vera function that checks if a string is longer than a given threshold. Use the string_length built-in function and compare the result to the threshold. The first parameter is the string, the second is the threshold as a Nat.
description_neutral: Check if a string's length is strictly greater than a given threshold.
notes: Tests composing string_length with comparison. String operations fall to Tier 3 runtime.
